name: EVEZ arXiv Scanner — Auto FIRE Events — FREE Weekly

parameters.jsCode:
const slot = Math.floor(Date.now()/(7*24*3600*1000));
const queries = [
  'cs.MA — multi-agent context scoping (DACS family)',
  'cs.LG — oscillator/phase encoding (KoPE family)',
  'cs.CL — attention-free byte-level (Kathleen family)',
  'cs.AI — meta-principle physics (MPPA family)',
  'quant-ph — quantum temporal topology (QTM family)',
  'cs.AI — autonomous falsifiable agents (EVEZ-OS family)',
];
return [{json:{
  version:'WF8 arXiv CPF Scanner',
  pid:335, ts:new Date().toISOString(),
  schedule:'Every Sunday at 09:00',
  current_week_slot: slot,
  this_week_query: queries[slot%queries.length],
  query_rotation: queries,
  formula:'poly_c=tau*omega*topo/2*sqrt(N)',
  thresholds:{canonical:'poly_c >= 0.9 → FIRE event generated',pending:'0.5 <= poly_c < 0.9 → logged only',noise:'poly_c < 0.5 → ignored'},
  papers_per_run: 15,
  ai_budget:'top 5 CANONICAL papers get LLM enrichment',
  outputs:['evez-ledger webhook','evez-autonomous-ledger GitHub','FIRE entity in Base44'],
  validated_by:'4 known CANONICAL papers — DACS(5.02),KoPE(5.94),Kathleen(4.03),MPPA(8.57)',
  webhooks:{
    scan_now:'POST /webhook/evez-arxiv-scan (optional: {query,max_results})',
    status:'GET /webhook/evez-arxiv-status',
  },
  witnessed_by:'XyferViperZephyr',
}}];
